prompt: Create a high-fashion editorial photograph of a tall runway model wearing a dramatic crimson red silk halter gown with a twisted high neckline, open shoulders, and voluminous flowing fabric caught by the wind, standing ankle-deep in reflective floodwater in a Venetian piazza resembling Piazza San Marco. The model is centered in a powerful full-body pose, one side of the dress billowing outward like a sail, wet hem trailing through the water, with the face softly obscured and no visible text. Surround the scene with ornate Venetian arcades, marble columns, historic façades, and the domes and spires of a grand basilica in the background. Use golden hour warm backlight, glowing haze, long architectural shadows, and shimmering reflections across the water. Style it as a Vogue Italia luxury fashion spread shot on medium format film, with cinematic realism, rich fabric texture, elegant composition, shallow depth of field, symmetrical perspective, natural water ripples, and a refined, dramatic, magazine-cover atmosphere.
